docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT STAMBAUGH, REBECCA A JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STAMBAUGH, REBECCA A $1,560.70 PRINCIPAL, $103.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,663.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
